calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 05, 2008:
Daniel M. Bornstein, attorney for plaintiff Mercy Housing California; Barbara Crain, representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; S. Roy Rosenthan, Esquire by limited scope representation for defendant Edmund Sieminski, who is also present

Settlement conference is held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 172 6th Street, #511, City and County of San Francisco, State of California. June 9, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
